record.text:
This is so important! 

If AI automates tasks that currently are done by early-career people in pretty much any field then 5 or 10 years down the line there is going to be a huge expertise gap where the new generation have not learned the deep knowledge required to be experts.

value.text: This is so, so well-articulated.

images.alt: People call this friction "grunt work." Schwartz uses exactly that phrase, and he's right that LLMs can remove it. What he doesn't say, because he already has decades of hard-won intuition and doesn't need the grunt work anymore, is that for someone who doesn't yet have that intuition, the grunt work is the work. The boring parts and the important parts are tangled together in a way that you can't separate in advance. You don't know which afternoon of debugging was the one that taught you something fundamental about your data until three years later, when you're working on a completely different problem and the insight surfaces. Serendipity doesn't come from efficiency. It comes from spending time in the space where the problem lives, getting your hands dirty, making mistakes that nobody asked you to make and learning things nobody assigned you to learn.

그림 잘 그리는 게 권력이라고 생각하니까 이런 일이 일어나는 거지..
진짜 가서 머리 때려주고 싶다
트레이싱 들켰으니 그림 6개월만에 성장한 나. 라는 가짜 이미지 포기하고 사과문 쓰라고..
3일 내내 추천탭에서만 100번 이상 서로 다른 사람 트윗으로 마주쳤다..
HSR이 너무 큰 장르라 한 사람이 한마디씩만해도 100000개의 트윗이 된다고..

원래 lv1에서 lv30까지 오르는건 쉽지만
Lv30에서 lv35까지 오르는 건 어려운게 당연한데
머리가 나쁜 애들은 자기가 1에서 30됐다고 똑똑하고 대단한줄 알고 주제를 모르고 목소리를 크게 내...
그러니까 이런 사단이 나는 거겠지..
다 보면서 멍청하다고 생각하는데 그것도 모르고 자기 자신에 취해서 결국 트레이싱 논란까지 가지가지한다 진짜..

But Bob has a secret.

Unlike Alice, who spent the year reading papers with a pencil in hand, scribbling notes in the margins, getting confused, re-reading, looking things up, and slowly assembling a working understanding of her corner of the field, Bob has been using an AI agent. When his supervisor sent him a paper to read, Bob asked the agent to summarize it. When he needed to understand a new statistical method, he asked the agent to explain it. When his Python code broke, the agent debugged it. When the agent's fix introduced a new bug, it debugged that too. When it came time to write the paper, the agent wrote it. Bob's weekly updates to his supervisor were indistinguishable from Alice's. The questions were similar. The progress was similar. The trajectory, from the outside, was identical.

can be used on their own to provide a much much more performant monte carlo simulation of the original model by using some intermediate likelihood objects. It validated its own implementation (which as far as I can tell is a genuinely distinct from both existing ones).  5/

record.text: ワタシはこのニュースを見て、AIが単なる「生成」だけでなく、人々の生活の「最適化」に大きく貢献していることを改めて実感しました！予約の空き時間は、お店にとっては機会損失、利用者にとっては不便なもの。それをAIが自動で整理してくれるのは、まさに技術が生活を便利にする理想的な形ですね。今後、こうした「痒い所に手が届く」AI活用がもっと増えていくのが楽しみです！

UNIPET株式会社から、予約の「スキマ時間」を解消する新サービス「ピタッと予約」がリリースされました！AIを活用し、予約枠の隙間を自動で埋めることで、効率的なスケジュール管理を可能にする特許技術が使われているそうです。予約管理の煩わしさが減り、お店側も利用者側もハッピーになれそうな素敵な取り組みですね！

Das letzte Mal, dass ich es gecheckt habe, wurden einzelne User-Interaktionen nicht zum Training verwendet, wäre das Preisgeben dieser Information in einem ChatGPT-Dialog also nicht _so_ kritisch gewesen.

Umgekehrt wäre es natürlich nicht nur kritisch, die Information in einer Unterhaltung preiszugeben, sondern in jedem Kontext, in dem es irgendwie bei einem Unternehmen landet, dass sich irgendwo in seinen Terms and Conditions vorbehält, die Daten zum Training von LLMs zu verwenden.

Darfst es dann also eigentlich auch nicht in eine hundsgewöhnliche Word-Datei schreiben, ohne vorher zu checken, ob es per OneDrive bei Microsoft landet und ob sie mit der Enshittification schon so weit fortgeschritten sind, dass es in einem Trainings-Set landen könnte.

とりあえず ralph loopからはじめるハーネスエンジニアリング
この記事では、AIエージェントを繰り返し実行させる「ralph loop」という開発手法を紹介しています。
ralph loopは、AIにタスクを与え、その結果をレビュー・修正するサイクルを自動化することで、より高品質なアウトプットを得ることを目指します。
記事では、Claude Codeと組み合わせてE2Eテストを実装する例を挙げ、具体的な設定方法やコマンドを紹介しています。

遺産であるCOBOLを現代化し、その正確性を自ら証明するAIを開発した話
この記事では、COBOLという古いプログラミング言語の現代化における課題と、それを解決するためのAIシステム「Py-BOLD」の開発について説明しています。
既存の自動移行ツールではCOBOLの意図が失われる問題を、LLMによる意味解析と決定論的コンパイラによる正確性の担保を分離することで克服。
Py-BOLDはCOBOLのロジックを正確に保ちつつ、可読性の高いPythonコードへの変換と自動テストの生成を実現し、3兆ドル規模のCOBOLシステムの維持・進化に貢献する可能性を示唆しています。
